name: composio
description: Use Composio from Codex through authenticated CLI workflows across 1,000+ apps.

interface.longDescription: Discover, connect, and use tools across 1,000+ apps from Codex through the authenticated Composio CLI. Search for the right tool, connect accounts with managed OAuth, execute actions, and script cross-app workflows.
defaultPrompt: Summarize my unread email and draft replies.
Turn new GitHub issues into Linear tickets.
Find this week's meetings and post a Slack brief.
